sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8549" key="a)neu/rhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεύρ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n8549.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">invention, discovery,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:9:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.9.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
